query:
-- Insert 17 attendance records for Tyler Brooks (Orange Belt since 2025-09-01)
-- Insert 16 attendance records for Mia Rodriguez (Yellow Belt since 2025-08-15)
-- Insert 15 attendance records for Jake Peterson (Brown Belt since 2025-07-01)

-- Tyler Brooks - 17 classes
INSERT INTO attendance (studentId, enrollmentId, checkInDate, beltRankAtCheckIn, xpAwarded, source, locationId) 
SELECT 1, id, '2025-09-05', 'Orange Belt', 10, 'kiosk', 'Tomball HQ' FROM enrollments WHERE customerName = 'Tyler Brooks'
UNION ALL SELECT 1, id, '2025-09-08', 'Orange Belt', 10, 'kiosk', 'Tomball HQ' FROM enrollments WHERE customerName = 'Tyler Brooks'
UNION ALL SELECT 1, id, '2025-09-12', 'Orange Belt', 10, 'kiosk', 'Tomball HQ' FROM enrollments WHERE customerName = 'Tyler Brooks'
